title: IEMOCAP Dyadic Emotion Multi-Tier Annotation
description: Multi-tier ELAN-style annotation of emotional dyadic interactions. Annotators segment per-speaker behavior on parallel timeline tiers, classify discrete emotion categories, and rate dimensional affect (valence, activation, dominance) on Likert-style scales. Based on the IEMOCAP motion capture database.
paperReference: Busso et al., Language Resources and Evaluation 2008
